title: Fix localhost MarkUS PocketBase integration
description: Align the browser live data layer with the self-hosted PocketBase hook routes so localhost can create and list comments against the Docker service.

affected_files.reason: align live route, list, and create payload with PocketBase hooks
fix public response export so localhost PocketBase hook can list/create comments

verify_command: sprout doctor && bunx playwright test --project=chromium tests/annotate.spec.js

agent_notes.author: agent
agent_notes.content: Aligned the browser live data layer to the PocketBase hook contract. Browser localhost smoke uses a same-origin proxy because Chrome blocks direct cross-port loopback fetches from localhost:4200 to localhost:8090 with Private Network Access preflight rules.

metadata.reason: fix public response export so localhost PocketBase hook can list/create comments

summary: Docker-backed localhost smoke passes after aligning the live client with the PocketBase public API contract.
